header: Open the box. It's all in there.
subheadline: Expand any capability to see what it does for your team. Everything below ships in the package — even in the free Community tier.

items.title: Backend previews for all 255 elements
items.content: Every content element renders a real preview in the TYPO3 page module. Editors recognize a hero, a pricing table, or a logo wall at a glance — no more guessing from gray record titles, no more publish-and-pray.

items.title: 15 runtime-switchable theme presets
items.content: Five presets from ui.shadcn.com/create plus ten house presets, from Aurora to Midnight. Pick one in site settings and the whole site repaints instantly — a redesign that costs a dropdown click, not a developer sprint.

items.title: Five switchable icon libraries
items.content: Lucide, Tabler, HugeIcons, Phosphor, and Remix Icon behind stable semantic keys. Change the entire site's icon style with one setting — every element keeps its icons, no content edits required.

items.title: Optional integrations
items.content: Ready-made styling for News, Powermail, Apache Solr, and the TYPO3 blog, plus 8 Form Framework forms with a Friendly Captcha fallback and a Brevo double-opt-in newsletter finisher. Your whole stack, one design language.

image.title: Desiderio content wizard
image.alternative: TYPO3 new-content wizard listing all ten Desiderio element groups.
image.description: Screenshot of the TYPO3 backend with Desiderio installed.
